name: LIGHTHOUSE ⑂ galengoodwick · fire to water 2 · v1

worldData.instructions:
MOUSE left/right — turn the day (the cursor is the clock)
CLICK — set the sea alight · click again to quench it

One click sparks a five-beat ignition: the water smolders out from the tower, catches, races, and roars into molten fire. Quench it and the tongues gutter while the embers linger long. No goal — watch the transition.
